flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 41 pp at All-State Career School vs the 2003–2007 baseline (45.5% vs 86.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at All-State Career School fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at All-State Career School rose 40% between 2021 and 2024 (44.2% → 62.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at All-State Career School rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (733 → 886).
